lose_military.name: Retired at Gunpoint
lose_military.flavour: The generals had a meeting. You weren't invited.

lose_business.name: Hostile Takeover, Personal Edition
lose_business.flavour: Capitalism got you before you could get capitalism.

lose_people.name: Democratically Removed (Permanently)
lose_people.flavour: The people have spoken. Loudly. With torches.

lose_bankruptcy.name: Fiscally Challenged Former Leader
lose_bankruptcy.flavour: You ran out of other people's money.

lose_default.name: Deposed Dictator
lose_default.flavour: Your reign has ended. As they all do.

S.name: Supreme Overlord
S.flavour: They'll build statues. You already did.

A.name: Seasoned Autocrat
A.flavour: Ruled with purpose and only mild atrocities.

B.name: The Pragmatist
B.flavour: Did what had to be done. Mostly legal.

C.name: Mediocre Majesty
C.flavour: Survived through luck, bribery, and stubbornness.

D_accidental.name: Accidental Dictator
D_accidental.flavour: Still standing. Nobody's more surprised than you.

F.name: Democracy's Problem Now
F.flavour: Won on a technicality. Please don't tell the UN.
